command:
echo "======== PHASE 2A: WIPE SAKURA TELEGRAM (vm-hermes .202) ========"
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REM'
echo "--- Stop gateway ---"
sudo systemctl stop hermes-gateway

echo "--- Delete webhook registration with Telegram (so old token is fully unregistered) ---"
# Use current token to delete webhook
CUR_TOKEN=$(grep TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service | grep -oE '[0-9]+:[A-Za-z0-9_-]+')
if [ -n "$CUR_TOKEN" ]; then
  curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot${CUR_TOKEN}/deleteWebhook?drop_pending_updates=true" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print('webhook deleted:', json.load(sys.stdin).get('ok'))"
fi

echo "--- Remove ALL telegram env vars from service file ---"
sudo cp /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service.bak-tgwipe
sudo python3 << 'PYEOF2'
content = open('/etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service').read()
lines = content.split('\n')
clean = [l for l in lines if 'TELEGRAM' not in l]
open('/etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service', 'w').write('\n'.join(clean))
print("telegram env vars removed from service file")
PYEOF2

echo "--- Remove telegram section from config.yaml ---"
python3 << 'PYEOF3'
import re, shutil
CFG = "/home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml"
shutil.copy(CFG, CFG + ".bak-tgwipe")
content = open(CFG).read()
# Remove telegram: block entirely
content = re.sub(r'^telegram:.*?(?=^\w|\Z)', '', content, flags=re.MULTILINE|re.DOTALL)
# Remove tools deny block we added
content = re.sub(r'^  deny:\n    - send_message\n', '', content, flags=re.MULTILINE)
open(CFG, 'w').write(content)
print("telegram section removed from config.yaml")
PYEOF3

echo "--- Wipe all sessions, state, logs ---"
echo '{}' > /home/jose/.hermes/sessions/sessions.json
echo '{}' > /home/jose/.hermes/gateway_state.json
rm -f /home/jose/.hermes/sessions/request_dump_*.json
> /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log
> /home/jose/.hermes/logs/agent.log
> /home/jose/.hermes/logs/errors.log
> /tmp/hermes.log 2>/dev/null
echo "sessions, state, logs cleared"

echo "--- Wipe channel directory ---"
echo '{}' > /home/jose/.hermes/channel_directory.json

echo "--- Reload systemd ---"
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
echo "SAKURA WIPE COMPLETE"
REM

echo ""
echo "======== PHASE 2B: WIPE REMY TELEGRAM (vm-openclaw .199) ========"
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REM2'
echo "--- Stop openclaw gateway ---"
systemctl --user stop openclaw-gateway

echo "--- Delete webhook/polling for current Remy token ---"
CUR_TOKEN="8993450718:AAFes1_h347Wa_t_FIrx_dmpHa8MsNp1G0g"
curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot${CUR_TOKEN}/deleteWebhook?drop_pending_updates=true" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print('webhook deleted:', json.load(sys.stdin).get('ok'))"

echo "--- Remove telegram channel from openclaw.json entirely ---"
python3 << 'PYEOF4'
import json, shutil
CFG = "/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json"
shutil.copy(CFG, CFG + ".bak-tgwipe")
d = json.load(open(CFG))
ch = d.get('channels', {})
removed = ch.pop('telegram', None)
d['channels'] = ch
json.dump(d, open(CFG, 'w'), indent=2)
print("telegram removed from openclaw.json:", removed is not None)
PYEOF4

echo "--- Clear openclaw sessions, state, logs ---"
find /tmp/openclaw/ -name "*.log" 2>/dev/null -exec truncate -s 0 {} \;
rm -f /home/jose/.openclaw/sessions/*.json 2>/dev/null
echo '{}' > /home/jose/.openclaw/state/memory.json 2>/dev/null || true
echo "openclaw logs and sessions cleared"

echo "REMY WIPE COMPLETE"
REM2
